languages.text:
Whenever the user scores a {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit{/g} with a ranged weapon for the first time in a {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, they throw one random grenade from their inventory into the cell occupied by the target, without spending {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g}.
Grenade throwing range is increased by +30.

traits.locale_text:
Whenever the user scores a critical hit with a ranged weapon for the first time in a round, they throw one random grenade from their inventory into the cell occupied by the target, without spending AP..
The range of using the grenades is increased by +30. They deal +{uip|Damage|bb29817d3fa14ffc953be08f15fa853f} more base damage.

languages.text:
Совершив {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}критическое попадание{/g} дистанционным оружием впервые за {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунд{/g}, обладатель аугмента бросает случайную гранату из инвентаря в клетку, занятую целью. Это действие не расходует {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}ОД{/g}.
Дальность броска гранат увеличивается на +30.

languages.text:
Cada vez que el usuario aseste un {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}impacto crítico{/g} con un arma a distancia por primera vez en un {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}, arroja una granada aleatoria del inventario hacia la casilla ocupada por el objetivo sin gastar {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}PA{/g}.
Aumenta el alcance de lanzamiento de granadas en +30.

languages.text:
Erzielt der Nutzer mit einer Fernkampfwaffe in einer {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} erstmals einen {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}kritischen Treffer{/g}, wirft er eine zufällige Granate aus dem Inventar auf das Feld des Ziels, ohne dabei {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} zu verbrauchen.
Granaten-Wurfreichweite erhöht sich um +30.

languages.text:
Kullanıcı, bir {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rauntta{/g} ilk kez menzilli bir silahla {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}kritik vuruş{/g} yaptığında hedefin bulunduğu hücreye {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}EP{/g} harcamadan envanterden rastgele bir bomba fırlatır.
Bomba fırlatma menzili +30 artar.

languages.text:
Lorsque l'utilisateur inflige un {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}coup critique{/g} avec une arme à distance pour la première fois au cours d'un {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, il lance une grenade choisie au hasard dans l'inventaire sur la case occupée par la cible, sans dépenser de {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}PA{/g}.
La portée de la grenade augmente de +30.

languages.text:
每{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}首次使用远程武器造成{g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}暴击{/g}时，使用者随机从物品栏向目标所在格投掷一颗手雷，不消耗{g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}行动点数{/g}。
手雷投掷距离增加30。
languages.original_text:
Whenever the user scores a {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit{/g} with a ranged weapon for the first time in a {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, they throw one random grenade from the inventory into the cell occupied by the target, without spending {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g}.
Grenade throwing range is increased by +30.

手雷投掷距离增加30。

languages.text:
{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g} において、使用者が射撃武器で{g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}クリティカル・ヒット{/g} を初めて獲得するたびに、{g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} を消費することなく、インベントリからランダムな手榴弾を1つ、対象が占拠しているマスに投擲する。
手榴弾の投擲範囲は+30増加する。手榴弾の投擲範囲は+30増加し、{uip|Damage|bb29817d3fa14ffc953be08f15fa853f} 基本{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}ダメージ{/g} を与える。

Grenade throwing range is increased by +30. They deal +{uip|Damage|bb29817d3fa14ffc953be08f15fa853f} more base {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.
